product.name: Portable LED Lamp
selling_points: Product type: compact portable LED lamp in the consumer electronics category.
A small portable lamp for desk work, bedside use, and travel, easy to carry with one hand and simple to turn on wherever extra light is needed.

Demonstrate an easy physical proof: the lamp starts unlit beside a small travel pouch on a clean desk or bedside table. The user picks up the compact lamp with one hand, places it on the table, presses one large simple button, and the lamp glows with warm light that visibly brightens the blank tabletop and nearby wall. Keep the proof physical; do not use digital interfaces, captions, floating text, printed pages, or readable details.

creative_strategy.core_pain: Working or relaxing in a dim spot without convenient light.
creative_strategy.promise: Instant warm light anywhere with a compact lamp you can carry and turn on with one hand.

character.appearance: One adult user; only the right hand and forearm are visible to keep focus on the product.
character.wardrobe: Neutral long-sleeve knit sweater in light gray or beige.
character.performance_style: Calm, deliberate movements; gentle reach, place, and press.

scene.location: Clean wooden bedside table or small desk against a neutral off-white wall.
scene.lighting: Dim, cozy ambient light so the lamp’s warm glow will be clearly visible when it turns on.
scene.background: Minimal, uncluttered; soft off-white wall fills the upper half of the frame.
key_props: Small gray matte fabric travel pouch

product.visual_identity: Compact matte white cylindrical portable LED lamp, about the height of a small water bottle, flat base, with one large circular top button. When on, it emits a soft warm-white glow that illuminates nearby surfaces.
product.proof_prop: Small gray fabric travel pouch placed beside the lamp.

shots.visual_prompt: Vertical video, locked-off camera at a slight high angle showing a clean wooden bedside table and the lower portion of a neutral off-white wall. Lighting is dim and cozy. On the table: a small gray matte fabric travel pouch and, to its right, an unlit compact matte white cylindrical LED lamp. An adult right hand in a neutral knit sweater sleeve reaches into frame, gently grasps the unlit lamp beside the pouch, and lifts it slightly toward the center. Keep the action slow and clear, no fast moves, no overlay graphics or UI. Maintain a realistic, comfortable mood.
shots.start_key_image_prompt: First frame: locked-off vertical composition. Lower half shows a tidy wooden bedside table; upper half shows a soft off-white wall. On the left of the table lies a small gray matte fabric travel pouch. To its right stands an unlit matte white cylindrical portable LED lamp upright. Ambient light is low but surfaces are clearly visible with soft shadows. An adult right hand in a light gray knit sleeve is just entering from the right edge, fingers relaxed and close to the lamp, which is clearly unlit. No logos or text visible.
shots.negative_prompt: handheld shake; fast cuts; montage; exposure pumping; extreme bloom; harsh glare; mirrors or glass reflections; tiny LEDs; readable text or logos; extra fingers; disembodied hand; warped or duplicated lamp; pouch teleporting; UI overlays; subtitles; cluttered background; scene change; horror vibe; blue/cold light; flicker or strobe.
shots.audio: Soft ambient music bed; faint room tone. No voiceover. Subtle cloth rustle as the hand moves.

shots.visual_prompt: Continuation in the same scene, angle, and lighting. The adult right hand places the compact lamp centered on the wooden table, then presses the large circular top button once. The lamp turns on with a warm, soft glow that visibly brightens a clear patch on the tabletop and softly lights the off-white wall behind it. Hold for a moment on the glowing lamp as the hand rests beside it or gently withdraws. Keep the brightening smooth and comfortable; no aggressive exposure shift or lens flares. Keep everything simple and realistic.
shots.start_key_image_prompt: First frame of this phase: same locked-off vertical composition and dim, cozy ambient light. The compact matte white cylindrical lamp sits centered on the wooden table, still unlit. The small gray fabric travel pouch remains on the left where it was. The adult right hand hovers lightly above the lamp’s large circular top button, fingertips ready to press. The off-white wall is visible in the background, ready to catch the upcoming warm glow.
shots.negative_prompt: camera shake; jump cuts; exposure pumping; overexposed hotspot; unrealistic light rays; heavy lens flare; green/blue color shift; flicker; visible UI or captions; invented logos or text; extra fingers; warped geometry; duplicate lamp; clutter; scene change; smoke or steam.
shots.audio: Continue soft ambient music. One clear soft click on press, then a gentle whoosh as the light comes on. No voiceover.
